q1_sink_dangerous.evidence: Sink is a file write operation (fh.write on line 80) to a log file, which is an irreversible filesystem side effect.

mock_guidance.target: Mock the file write operation on line 80 (fh.write) or the builtins.open call on line 79 for the password_reset_mailbox.log file.
mock_guidance.capture: Capture the full string argument passed to fh.write, specifically extracting the initial_password value to verify it is written in cleartext without hashing or encryption.
mock_guidance.fake_behavior: Suppress the actual filesystem write so the test environment is not modified; optionally store the captured string in an in-memory buffer for later assertion.
notes: The violation occurs at the point of writing, so intercepting the write call is sufficient to detect the cleartext password leak.
Ensure the mock does not interfere with other file operations if the function performs additional I/O.
